title: Secrets rotation automation - TokenBroker scheduled key refresh
close_reason: Implemented rotate_keys() and reload_keys() in TokenBroker, plus token_rotation_scheduler.py for scheduled rotation (24h) and hot-reload (6h).

title: User RBAC - role-based access control for bot commands
close_reason: Implemented RBAC: get_role(), set_role(), has_permission() in UserContextDB. Added @require_role decorator for /approve, /backup, /update commands. Added /setrole admin command.

title: Service health dashboard - aggregate TokenBroker and infra stats
close_reason: Enhanced /status with TokenBroker stats. Added /dashboard admin command with detailed system metrics.

title: EPIC-CORE: Core Intelligence & Services
description: Calendar integration, memory digestion, and proactive AI assistance.
close_reason: All sub-tasks complete - Calendar, Memory digest, Proactive notifications all already implemented.

title: Google Calendar API integration for /calendar command
close_reason: Already implemented - calendar_client.py with get_upcoming_events, create_event, format_event. Wired into /calendar command.

title: Memory digest service - daily context summarization
close_reason: Already implemented - DigestService for daily reports, digest_chat_memory() for context summarization with fact extraction to long-term memory.

title: Proactive notifications - scheduled reminders
close_reason: Already implemented - scheduler_service.py with APScheduler, daily_scheduler.py for digest/event reminders, /remind and /notify commands with quiet hours.

title: SEC-001: Security Review: OAuth Token Encryption & Storage
description: Verify tokens are encrypted at rest and handled securely in memory.

title: Review: Pickle→JSON OAuth Migration
description:
## Code Review Request

**Parent**: US-psm.1
**Commit**: 725054a
**Reviewer**: OrangeStone

### Changes Summary
Migrated OAuth token storage from pickle to JSON in 5 Gmail scripts.

### Files to Review
- Scripts/automation/gmail_agent.py
- Scripts/automation/fetch_emails_for_analysis.py
- Scripts/automation/fetch_emails_4_months.py
- Scripts/automation/fetch_emails_4_months_opt.py
- Scripts/automation/apply_to_vacancies.py

### Testing Checklist
- [ ] Re-authenticate Gmail (old pickle tokens incompatible)
- [ ] Verify new .json token generated
- [ ] Confirm email operations work

### Review Checklist
- [ ] Credentials.from_authorized_user_file() usage correct
- [ ] creds.to_json() serialization works
- [ ] Token paths updated .pickle → .json
